title: Phase I — Targeted Care
text: The first 30 days establish a baseline and start the work: a full evaluation, hands-on treatment, strength and rehab training, and a nutritional consultation.
hook: Start where you are, with a clear plan for what comes next.
imageAlt: A participant working through an early-phase strength and rehab session with a specialist.
whoFor: If you're a veteran, a young person, or someone facing financial barriers who needs to get moving again, Phase I is where you begin.
limits: Better in 90 is a recovery and conditioning program, not emergency or acute medical care. If you need urgent treatment, we'll help point you to the right provider.
howToStart: Reach out and we'll walk you through eligibility and the first evaluation — you don't need anything prepared.

title: Phase II — Whole Body Care
text: Days 31–60 build on that foundation with a mid-point evaluation and a fuller range of recovery — strength and rehab, cold plunge, gym access, F.I.T. therapy, and continued nutritional support.
hook: Recovery that works the whole body, not just the injury.
imageAlt: A participant using recovery and conditioning services during the whole-body phase.
whoFor: For participants who've completed Phase I and are ready to expand into full whole-body recovery.
limits: Services are delivered through partner facilities in Orange County. We'll be clear about what's available near you before you start.
howToStart: Phase II follows Phase I — your specialist will set the plan at your mid-point evaluation.

title: Phase III — Maintenance Care
text: Days 61–90 lock in the gains with a final evaluation, ongoing treatment and training, infrared sauna and recovery services, and a long-term care plan. Beyond Day 90, we continue maintenance care for as long as we can.
hook: We will continue to provide maintenance care for as long as we can.
imageAlt: A participant in a maintenance-phase session, building a long-term routine.
whoFor: For participants completing the 90-day cycle who want to hold their progress and keep going.
limits: Continued maintenance care depends on available capacity and funding — it's a commitment we honor as far as our resources allow.
howToStart: Phase III is the final stage of Better in 90; your long-term plan is built with you before Day 90.
